hero.headline: Cybersecurity for those who can't afford it.
hero.subheadline: The Free Security is a nonprofit organization helping small and medium businesses across the former Yugoslavia region protect themselves from cyberattacks, even when they have no budget for it.

about.title: Who are we?
about.pageTitle: Who is The Free Security and why does it exist?
about.missionText: Our mission is to provide practical cybersecurity protection to small and medium businesses in the former Yugoslavia region that have no budget for commercial security services.
about.visionText: Our vision is a region where no small business is an easy target for attackers simply because they can't afford protection.
about.heroDesc: A nonprofit organization helping small businesses in the former Yugoslavia region protect themselves from cyberattacks, even when they have no budget for it.
about.whyExistP1: Cyberattacks don't discriminate. Ransomware doesn't ask if you're a nonprofit before encrypting your data. Phishing doesn't skip small businesses because they have a small budget.
about.whyExistP2: And yet, commercial cybersecurity services are only available to those who can afford them. An assessment for a small company costs between 2,000 and 10,000 euros. For an organization with a limited budget, that's impossible.
about.whyExistP3: The Free Security was born to bridge that gap. If a company truly has no budget for protection, we're here. If they do have resources but don't want to invest them in security, we refer them to professional partners who handle commercial pentest engagements. We're not a replacement for professional pentesters, but we're the right support for those who can't access commercial services.
whatWeDoItems: Cybersecurity training for teams and individuals
Security policies and incident response plans
about.foundingP1: Filip Kecman, founder and executive director, recognized the gap between the need for cyber protection and the availability of professional services for organizations without large budgets.
about.foundingP2: Together with Damjan Cvetanović, who brings years of experience as an advisor, and Dušan Jevtić as mentor and trainer, the team built a structure that combines professional standards with a nonprofit mission.
about.foundingP3: Today, The Free Security has a team of 12+ active interns and volunteers who work together on projects, learn under the mentorship of experienced professionals, and contribute to a safer digital space.
about.whoWeAreP1: We are not a commercial firm or a team of experienced ethical hackers working for free. The Free Security is an organization that guides security testing students through real projects, under direct mentorship from experienced professionals. Students conduct pentest engagements, learn on real cases, and directly contribute to client security.
about.whoWeAreP2: What drives us is a shared goal: that no small business in the region remains unprotected simply because it can't afford the commercial price.

free.title: Free for those who need it
free.desc: We work for free with organizations that have no budget for commercial protection. Others we refer to the right partners.

expert.title: Expert team
expert.desc: Mentors with experience in industrial and offensive security.

practical.title: Practical approach
practical.desc: We present results clearly, without technical jargon.

privacy.title: Confidentiality
privacy.desc: All client data is strictly confidential.

tailored.title: Tailored to you
tailored.desc: Every service is tailored to your specific needs.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: We are open about our methodology and results.

about.trainingP1: Our training program is designed for hands-on learning. Participants don't just listen to theory — they work on real pentest projects with real clients, under direct supervision of experienced mentors.
about.trainingP2: The program is tailored for participants who want to enter the field of security testing. These are students and beginners who build skills through real-world engagements, not simulated environments.
about.trainingP3: Participants receive a recommendation and a portfolio of work that proves their skills and opens career doors in cybersecurity.
about.ctaDesc: Whether you need help or want to contribute, we're here.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Free for SMEs and organizations in the former Yugoslavia region that have no budget for commercial cybersecurity.
services.notSure: Not sure which service you need?
services.contactDesc: Contact us and we'll assess your needs together, free of charge and with no obligations.

webApp.title: Web Application Penetration Testing
webApp.description: Comprehensive security assessment of your web applications. We identify OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, logic flaws and misconfigurations that attackers can exploit before they do.

training.title: Cybersecurity Training
training.description: Hands-on training tailored to your team or organization. From digital hygiene basics to advanced techniques, we teach you how to recognize and respond to threats.

infra.title: Public Infrastructure Scanning
infra.description: Passive and active scanning of your public attack surface. We discover open ports, outdated services and misconfigured systems before attackers find them.

policy.title: Security Policies and Incident Response Plans
policy.description: We help you create clear security policies and incident response plans. When an attack happens, you know exactly what to do.

footprint.title: Digital Footprint Analysis
footprint.description: We discover what is publicly available about you or your organization on the internet. Attackers use this information in reconnaissance phases, and we help you reduce your exposure. OSINT analysis at no cost.

consulting.title: Cybersecurity Consulting and Mentorship
consulting.description: Expert advice for organizations looking to improve their security culture. Our mentors guide you through complex decisions and team building.

whyJoin.title: Why join us?
whyJoin.subtitle: Our training program provides real experience in the world of cybersecurity.

practical.title: Practical Learning
practical.desc: Work on real projects and cases, not just theory. Gain experience you can show to employers.

mentorship.title: Expert Mentorship
mentorship.desc: Work directly with experienced cybersecurity professionals who guide you through every step.

experience.title: Real Experience
experience.desc: Earn certificates and recommendations that validate your skills. Build a portfolio that opens career doors.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Our services are free for small and medium businesses and organizations in the former Yugoslavia region that genuinely have no budget for commercial cybersecurity. Companies that have the resources but simply don't want to spend them on security are referred to our professional partners who handle commercial pentest engagements.
faq.a2: We work with small and medium businesses across the former Yugoslavia region that are easy targets for attackers precisely because they lack the budget for protection. If an organization has the means for commercial security services, we are not the right fit, but we are happy to refer them to the right professionals.
faq.q3: How do I request a service?
faq.a3: Simply fill out the contact form at /contact or contact us directly via email. We respond within 48 business hours.
faq.q4: Do you offer training for beginners?
faq.a4: Yes! Our training program is designed for all levels, from complete beginners to experienced IT professionals looking to enter cybersecurity. We tailor content to your existing knowledge.
faq.q5: How can I join as a volunteer or intern?
faq.a5: Check our Careers page for open positions. We're looking for ethical hackers, marketing professionals and business development partners. All positions are volunteer or with symbolic compensation.
